name: HAVOCH600F
comment: The Event Lighting HAVOCH600F is a powerhouse LED Moving Head Hybrid designed for a versatile lighting experience. This single 640W white LED engine powerfully illuminates any space, delivering an engaging light show with 8 + open colours, 8 + open static gobos and 7 + open rotating gobos.

capabilities.comment: CW Spin From  Fast to Slow
CCW Spin From  Slow to Fast
